name: idecn
description: IDE-like workspace and file tree components for React with material icons

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && bun x tsdown src/index.ts --format esm --dts --deps.neverBundle react --deps.neverBundle react-dom --deps.neverBundle @base-ui/react --deps.neverBundle shiki --deps.neverBundle @shikijs/monaco --deps.neverBundle @monaco-editor/react --deps.neverBundle dockview-core --deps.neverBundle dockview-react --deps.neverBundle lucide-react --deps.neverBundle next-themes && bun scripts/gen-demo-tree.ts && bun scripts/build-registry.ts && cd web && bun run build
scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules bun.lock dist .cache .next .turbo web/node_modules web/.next
scripts.gen: bun scripts/gen-icons.ts && bun scripts/gen-demo-tree.ts && bun scripts/build-registry.ts
scripts.prepublishOnly: bun x tsdown src/index.ts --format esm --dts --deps.neverBundle react --deps.neverBundle react-dom --deps.neverBundle @base-ui/react --deps.neverBundle shiki --deps.neverBundle @shikijs/monaco --deps.neverBundle @monaco-editor/react --deps.neverBundle dockview-core --deps.neverBundle dockview-react --deps.neverBundle lucide-react --deps.neverBundle next-themes
scripts.test: bun run check && bun run build && bun run test:registry
